scripts.build:site: ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 astro build && npm run prune:dist && npm run verify:site
scripts.build:deploy: npm run content:verify:runtime && npm run runtime:verify && npm run render:verify && npm run tour:verify && npm run museum:sync && npm run build:site
scripts.check:fast: npm run architecture:verify && npm run lint && npm test
scripts.check:standard: npm run check:fast && npm run build:site && npm run test:e2e:smoke:run
scripts.check:release: npm run check:fast && npm run content:verify:runtime && npm run runtime:verify && npm run render:verify && npm run tour:verify && npm run museum:sync && npm run build:site && npm run test:e2e:run
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build:site && npm run test:e2e:run
scripts.test:e2e:smoke: npm run build:site && npm run test:e2e:smoke:run
scripts.content:refresh: node scripts/refresh-museum-catalog.mjs && node scripts/verify-museum-catalog.mjs && npm run runtime:sync && npm run render:sync && npm run museum:sync && npm run site:renditions
